name: CATHAY PAC.AIRW.HD-20ADR5
summary: CATHAY PAC.AIRW.HD-20ADR5 represents an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) of Cathay Pacific Airways Limited. This ADR represents a fraction of a share (20 ADRs per 5 shares) of Cathay Pacific Airways stock. Cathay Pacific is an international airline based in Hong Kong.
